about.subtitle: Engineer, builder, and problem solver focused on delivering high-quality software.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To design and build reliable, scalable software that creates measurable value for businesses and users across global markets.

passion.title: Passion
passion.text: I'm passionate about crafting elegant user experiences backed by robust engineering — from polished frontends to resilient backend systems.

experience.title: Experience
experience.text: I work across the full stack, partnering with teams in Canada, France, Germany, the UK and the US to ship products that perform at scale.

items: Quality over quantity — every detail matters
Clear communication across cultures and time zones
